metadata.description: Tune Claude Code's own configuration. A home for skills that write and audit Claude Code's config files against the official docs — claude-md-writer for CLAUDE.md / .claude/rules/ memory, a usage statusline, and /execute-task for driving a coding task end-to-end from intake to merge.

plugins.name: cc-tuner
plugins.description: Audit CLAUDE.md / .claude/rules/ memory against the official docs (claude-md-writer), install a rate-limit + context usage statusline (/cc-tuner:statusline-setup), and drive coding tasks end-to-end from intake to merge (/cc-tuner:execute-task).
